channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260419)
item.description:
What's New

fix: treat Enter/Return as definitive session boundary in processWordBreak

Previously, Enter/Return used the generic non-space word break path which:

  1. Preserved macroKey (stale macro data leaked across Enter boundary,

causing false macro matches → 'text overflow' bug in Messenger)

  1. Did not reset focusChangedDuringTyping (flag from autocomplete popup

persisted, causing backspace restore to be incorrectly skipped)

  1. Set spaceCount=1 (phantom space in history since Enter is not a space)

Now Enter/Return gets its own path that calls startNewSession() for a

complete state reset, sets spaceCount=0, and clears focusChangedDuringTyping.

Other non-space word breaks (!, @, #, etc.) keep their existing behavior

to support macro building across punctuation.

Added 7 unit tests covering: macroKey cleared, spaceCount=0, focus flag

reset, buffer cleared, Return behaves like Enter, non-Enter breaks

unaffected, and new typing after Enter starts with clean macroKey.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
